name: PCSX2
description: Configurações para o emulador PCSX2 geradas a partir do es_features.cfg.

options.label: Proporção de FMV
options.description: Set the aspect ratio of the FMV cinematics.

options.label: Modo de Desentrelaçamento
options.description: Force the rendering and display of frames to progressive mode.

options.label: Desativar Tela Cheia
options.description: Use this option if PCSX2 is not displaying Ativado the correct monitor.

options.label: Anti-Aliasing (FXAA)
options.description: Set Anti Aliasing for rendered content.

options.label: Filtragem Bilinear
options.description: Use Filtragem Bilinear to smooth the overall picture.

options.label: Filtragem de Texturas
options.description: Control the texture filtering of the Emulação.

options.label: Filtragem Trilinear
options.description: Control the texture tri-filtering of the Emulação.

options.label: Filtragem Anisotrópica
options.description: Enhance the quality of textures Ativado surface.

options.label: ANTI BLUR
options.description: Enables anti blur hack, less accurate but makes games less blurry.

options.label: BLENDING ACCURACY
options.description: Control the accuracy level of GS blending unit. Higher values will emulate blending more accurately in the shader.

options.label: DITHERING FILTER
options.description: Improves color depth.

options.label: CONTRAST Adaptável SHARPENING
options.description: Enable FidelityFX contrast Adaptável sharpening.

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: Vídeo
options.description: Select which graphics API to use internally. Software mode disable graphics enhancements.

options.label: MIP MAPPING
options.description: Mipmapping is necessary for some games.

options.label: SKIP BIOS
options.description: Skips the BIOS boot animation displayed when loading content.

options.label: Inicialização Rápida (Fast Boot)
options.description: Boost Emulação during boot.

options.label: FORCE BIOS
options.description: Force the emulator to use a specific BIOS file.

options.label: Ativar Cheats / Trapaças
options.description: Automatically loads and applies cheats Ativado game start.

options.label: START BIOS
options.description: This will run the console BIOS instead of a game.

options.label: MULTITHREAD VU1
options.description: Improve performance for cpu with more than 4 cores, Padrão is enabled.

options.label: DRAW STATISTICS
options.description: Enable performance statistics.

options.label: NOTIFICATIONS
options.description: Show notifications.

options.label: DNS1 MODE
options.description: When selecting 'MANUAL', specify an address in the next setting.

options.label: DNS1 ADDRESS
options.description: When an address is entered, the mode will automatically be set as 'MANUAL'.

options.label: DNS2 MODE
options.description: When selecting 'MANUAL', specify an address in the next setting.

options.label: DNS2 ADDRESS
options.description: When an address is entered, the mode will automatically be set as 'MANUAL'.

options.label: Desativar Offset de Interlace
options.description: Switching this Ativado when using a dedicated Modo de Desentrelaçamento can help reduce blur.

options.label: Patches Widescreen
options.description: Automatically load Patches Widescreen Ativado game start-up.

options.label: Patches No-Interlace
options.description: Automatically load Patches Não-Interlace Ativado game start-up.

options.label: SCREEN OFFSETS
options.description: Useful for games with screenshake effects such as Wipeout Fusion, can make the picture blury.

options.label: MANUAL RENDERER FIXES
options.description: Enable manual Hacks / Velocidade below, otherwise Hacks / Velocidade will be apllied automatically.

options.label: SKIPDRAW START (HACK)
options.description: Skips drawing surfaces for the area defined left and right.

options.label: DISABLE SAFE FEATURES
options.description: Disabling safe features can help various games such as Xenosaga, Kingdom Hearts...

options.label: HALF PIXEL OFFSET
options.description: Might fix some misaligned fog, bloom or blend effect.

options.label: ROUND SPRITE
options.description: Correct the sampling of 2D sprite textures when upscaling.

options.label: ALIGN SPRITE
options.description: Fix issues with upscaling in Namco games (Ace Combat, Tekken, SoulCalibur...).

options.label: MERGE SPRITE
options.description: Replaces post-processing multiple paving sprites by a single fat sprite.

options.label: WILD ARMS HACK
options.description: Lower the GS precision to avoid gap between pixels when upscaling. Fix Wild Arms text, SoulCalibur ghosting.

options.label: TEXTURE OFFSETS (HACK)
options.description: Offset for the ST/UV texture coordinates.

options.label: FPU MULTIPLY
options.description: For Tales of Destiny.

options.label: SKIP MPEG
options.description: Skip videos/FMVs.

options.label: PRELOAD TLB
options.description: For Goemon.

options.label: EE TIMING HACK
options.description: General purpose timing hack.

options.label: INSTANT DMA HACK
options.description: Good for cache Emulação problems.

options.label: OPH FLAG HACK
options.description: For Bleach Blade Battlers.

options.label: EMULATE GIF FIFO
options.description: Correct but slower.

options.label: DMA BUSY HACK
options.description: Deny writes when busy.

options.label: DELAY VIF1 STALLS
options.description: For SOCOM 2 HUD/Spy Hunter.

options.label: EMULATE VIF FIFO
options.description: Correct but slower.

options.label: VU I BIT HACK
options.description: For Scarface The World is Yours and Crash Tag Team Racing.

options.label: VU ADD HACK
options.description: For Tri-Ace Games.

options.label: VU OVERFLOW HACK
options.description: For Superman Returns.

options.label: VU SYNC
options.description: For Run Behind and M-bit Games.

options.label: VU XGKICK SYNC
options.description: Correct but slower.

options.label: FORCE BLIT INTERNAL FPS DETECTION
options.description: When Automático-detection fails.

options.label: INPUT
options.description: Force usage of SDL or DInput driver for controllers, set this if more than 4 controllers are used, as XInput limits to 4 players.

options.label: USE TRIGGERS TO BRAKE/ACCELERATE
options.description: Can be useful for Gran Turismo, triggers will be mapped to different buttons.

options.label: PRESSURE MODIFIER BUTTON
options.description: Can be useful for Metal Gear, to simulate pressure sensitivity.

options.label: GUNCON BUTTON MAPPING
options.description: Define how to map the guncon2 buttons.

options.label: INVERT TRIGGER/RELOAD
options.description: Activate this when using WiiZapper to invert trigger and reload buttons.

options.label: CALIBRATION BUTTON
options.description: By Padrão, calibration is done with middle mouse button, this setting allows to set an alternative button for the calibration shot.

options.label: CROSSHAIR
options.description: Place custom 'crosshair.png' file in 'cross' subfolder of the emulator or select file below.

options.label: CUSTOM CROSSHAIR FILE
options.description: Use 'custom' crosshair to enable the crosshair file selected.

options.label: CUSTOM CROSSHAIR SIZE
options.description: Values above 1.00 will increase size, values below will reduce.

options.label: FORCE WHEEL 1 INDEX
options.description: Force wheel index, can be useful if RetroBat sets wrong index.

options.label: FORCE WHEEL 2 INDEX
options.description: Force wheel index, can be useful if RetroBat sets wrong index.
